'''鈭歸-ng-g''' ('''wangaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaotize|chaotize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaotize|chaotize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-ng-g
|-
! Lemma
| wangaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wangagithi|wangagithi]] || [[word:wangagiji|wangagiji]] || [[word:wangagishi|wangagishi]] || [[word:wangagi|wangagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangaguthuth|wangaguthuth]] || [[word:wangagujuj|wangagujuj]] || [[word:wangagushush|wangagushush]] || [[word:wangag|wangag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangaguthu|wangaguthu]] || [[word:wangaguju|wangaguju]] || [[word:wangagushu|wangagushu]] || [[word:wangagu|wangagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangagufuth|wangagufuth]] || [[word:wangagufuj|wangagufuj]] || [[word:wangagufush|wangagufush]] || [[word:wangaguf|wangaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wangagethe|wangagethe]] || [[word:wangageje|wangageje]] || [[word:wangageshe|wangageshe]] || [[word:wangage|wangage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangagothoth|wangagothoth]] || [[word:wangagojoj|wangagojoj]] || [[word:wangagoshosh|wangagoshosh]] || [[word:wangag|wangag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangagotho|wangagotho]] || [[word:wangagojo|wangagojo]] || [[word:wangagosho|wangagosho]] || [[word:wangago|wangago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangagofoth|wangagofoth]] || [[word:wangagofoj|wangagofoj]] || [[word:wangagofosh|wangagofosh]] || [[word:wangagof|wangagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wangag忙th忙|wangag忙th忙]] || [[word:wangag忙j忙|wangag忙j忙]] || [[word:wangag忙sh忙|wangag忙sh忙]] || [[word:wangag忙|wangag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangagathath|wangagathath]] || [[word:wangagajaj|wangagajaj]] || [[word:wangagashash|wangagashash]] || [[word:wangag|wangag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangagatha|wangagatha]] || [[word:wangagaja|wangagaja]] || [[word:wangagasha|wangagasha]] || [[word:wangaga|wangaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangagafath|wangagafath]] || [[word:wangagafaj|wangagafaj]] || [[word:wangagafash|wangagafash]] || [[word:wangagaf|wangagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wangagasha|wangagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowangagasha|gowangagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwangagasha|gokiwangagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wangagn眉sha|wangagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowangagnkn眉sha|gowangagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwangagn眉sha|gokiwangagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wangagsh毛sha|wangagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowangagnksh毛sha|gowangagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwangagsh毛sha|gokiwangagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wangagrosha|wangagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowangagnkrosha|gowangagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwangagrosha|gokiwangagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wangagmusha|wangagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangagnkmusha|gowangagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangagmusha|gokiwangagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wangagsherasha|wangagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowangagnksherasha|gowangagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwangagsherasha|gokiwangagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wangagngasha|wangagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowangagnkngasha|gowangagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwangagngasha|gokiwangagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wangagyasha|wangagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowangagnkyasha|gowangagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwangagyasha|gokiwangagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wangagyamasha|wangagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowangagnkyamasha|gowangagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwangagyamasha|gokiwangagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wangagn眉sh毛sha|wangagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowangagnkn眉sh毛sha|gowangagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwangagn眉sh毛sha|gokiwangagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wangagn眉rosha|wangagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowangagnkn眉rosha|gowangagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwangagn眉rosha|gokiwangagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangagn眉musha|wangagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangagnkn眉musha|gowangagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangagn眉musha|gokiwangagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wangagsh毛n眉sha|wangagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowangagnksh毛n眉sha|gowangagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwangagsh毛n眉sha|gokiwangagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wangagsh毛rosha|wangagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowangagnksh毛rosha|gowangagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwangagsh毛rosha|gokiwangagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangagsh毛musha|wangagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangagnksh毛musha|gowangagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangagsh毛musha|gokiwangagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wangagron眉sha|wangagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowangagnkron眉sha|gowangagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwangagron眉sha|gokiwangagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wangagrosh毛sha|wangagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowangagnkrosh毛sha|gowangagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwangagrosh毛sha|gokiwangagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wangagromusha|wangagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowangagnkromusha|gowangagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwangagromusha|gokiwangagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wangagmun眉sha|wangagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowangagnkmun眉sha|gowangagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwangagmun眉sha|gokiwangagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wangagmush毛sha|wangagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowangagnkmush毛sha|gowangagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwangagmush毛sha|gokiwangagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wangagmurosha|wangagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowangagnkmurosha|gowangagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwangagmurosha|gokiwangagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wangag|wangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:w忙ng忙g|w忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howangag|howangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:how忙ng忙g|how忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowangag|hohowangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohow忙ng忙g|hohow忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉wangag|n眉wangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉w忙ng忙g|n眉w忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉wangag|n眉n眉wangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉w忙ng忙g|n眉n眉w忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂wangag|n茂wangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂w忙ng忙g|n茂w忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂wangag|n茂n茂wangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂w忙ng忙g|n茂n茂w忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwangag|luwangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luw忙ng忙g|luw忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwangag|luluwangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluw忙ng忙g|luluw忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwangag|liwangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liw忙ng忙g|liw忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwangag|liliwangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliw忙ng忙g|liliw忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowangag|kowangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kow忙ng忙g|kow忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowangag|kokowangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokow忙ng忙g|kokow忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewangag|kewangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kew忙ng忙g|kew忙ng忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewangag|kekewangag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekew忙ng忙g|kekew忙ng忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
